messages.content:
Ozzy Osbourne sang lead vocals for which British band?

Group of answer choices

Jethro Tull

Deep Purple

the Faces

Black Sabbath
Black Sabbath

Jimmy Page initially got his start with which group?

Group of answer choices

the Rolling Stones

the Yardbirds

Deep Purple

Cream
the Yardbirds

Both Blood, Sweat & Tears and Chicago were musically known for

Group of answer choices

releasing concept jazz-fusion albums.

incorporating jazz-rock horn sections.

releasing live, improvisational albums.

blending blues-rock improvisations with horn sections.
incorporating jazz-rock horn sections.

Which element of “Whole Lotta Love” demonstrates psychedelic characteristics?

Group of answer choices

the simple verse-chorus structure

the breakdown, spacey section with stereo effects

the short guitar-riff introduction

the use of heavy drumming
the breakdown, spacey section with stereo effects

Which song by Neil Young prompted a response by Lynyrd Skynyrd in “Sweet Home Alabama”?

Group of answer choices

“Southern Man”

“Heart of Gold”

“Old Man”

“After the Gold Rush”
“Southern Man”

Alice Cooper was known for

Group of answer choices

creating songs and albums that were difficult to pin down stylistically.

concept albums about a space alien.

live shows that drew on gruesome and ghoulish topics.

cartoonish makeup and costumes.
live shows that drew on gruesome and ghoulish topics.

How did Elton John change the model of the singer-songwriter by the latter half of the 1970s?

Group of answer choices

He employed a rock band to accompany him.

He cowrote songs with Bernie Taupin.

He built his songwriting skills from the Brill Building example.

He added psychedelic elements to his song lyrics.
He employed a rock band to accompany him.

All of the following descriptions apply to Frank Zappa’s music EXCEPT

Group of answer choices

blended with satire.

compositional sophistication.

jazz-fusion-style playing.

lack of musical virtuosity.
lack of musical virtuosity.

The members of the Eagles had been in a backup band for which singer?

Group of answer choices

Mike Nesmith

Linda Ronstadt

Don Henley

Glyn Johns
Linda Ronstadt

From 1966 to 1969, artists sought to change the focus of rock music from the album to the single.

Group of answer choices

True

False
False
